posts.text: Can prior authorization be fixed? Should it be?. Controlling health care costs depends on eliminating unnecessary, low-value care. But insurers have an inherent conflict of interest and shouldn't be running prior authorization.
posts.quote: Can prior authorization be fixed? Should it be?. Controlling health care costs depends on eliminating unnecessary, low-value care. But insurers have an inherent conflict of interest and shouldn't be running prior authorization.

posts.text: A health care plan for the mid-terms. If I were running for office this fall, here’s what I’d say: Protect families first.
posts.quote: A health care plan for the mid-terms. If I were running for office this fall, here’s what I’d say: Protect families first.

posts.text: Time to rethink health care reform. Trump’s undeclared war in the Middle East postpones the much-needed debate over health care affordability – the #1 issue bedeviling average Americans.
posts.quote: Time to rethink health care reform. Trump’s undeclared war in the Middle East postpones the much-needed debate over health care affordability – the #1 issue bedeviling average Americans.

posts.text: Data on immigrants seeking ER care shared with ICE. A recent court ruling allowing data sharing will cause undocumented workers to avoid care when seriously injured or ill.

posts.text: A year spent degrading health. People will die, more will get sick, and many will forgo care because of the Trump administration's assaults on public health over the past year.
posts.quote: A year spent degrading health. People will die, more will get sick, and many will forgo care because of the Trump administration's assaults on public health over the past year.

posts.text: Fraud fight rule #1: Go after the big fish. The DOJ crackdown on fraud at Somali-run social service organizations ignores the biggest alleged fraud scheme based in Minnesota.
posts.quote: Fraud fight rule #1: Go after the big fish. The DOJ crackdown on fraud at Somali-run social service organizations ignores the biggest alleged fraud scheme based in Minnesota.

posts.text: The GOP v. kids. The Trump administration is waging war against programs that offer child care, health care and education to the nation's children. Working class Americans will pay the steepest price.
posts.quote: The GOP v. kids. The Trump administration is waging war against programs that offer child care, health care and education to the nation's children. Working class Americans will pay the steepest price.

posts.text: Trump's concepts of a non-plan. The so-called Great Health Care Plan would do next to nothing to lower overall costs or premiums paid by individuals, families and employers.
posts.quote: Trump's concepts of a non-plan. The so-called Great Health Care Plan would do next to nothing to lower overall costs or premiums paid by individuals, families and employers.

posts.text: Advisors to new nutrition guidelines rife with conflicts of interest. When RFK, Jr. dismissed the old advisors, he cited their corporate ties. Their replacements took cash from the National Cattlemen Beef Association and National Dairy Council, among others.
posts.quote: Advisors to new nutrition guidelines rife with conflicts of interest. When RFK, Jr. dismissed the old advisors, he cited their corporate ties. Their replacements took cash from the National Cattlemen Beef Association and National Dairy Council, among others.

posts.text: What the MAHA food guidelines ignore. Processed foods are cheap. And Americans now get a third of their calories from dining out, where high sugar, high fat, high salt, high carbs and processed meats rule.
posts.quote: What the MAHA food guidelines ignore. Processed foods are cheap. And Americans now get a third of their calories from dining out, where high sugar, high fat, high salt, high carbs and processed meats rule.
